source_citation: Yu, Collavo, Zheng, Owen, Sattin & Powles 2007, Plant Physiol 145(2):547-558
notes: Confirmed directly from paper's own Table IV: EF538937 (susceptible VLR1 2002 bulk) is the wild-type reference; EF538939 (resistant H1/10) differs at exactly one position (raw fragment position 461 = full-length AJ310767 position 2088, C->R), matching Table IV's stated SNP exactly. EF538940 (resistant H1/19) is an independent clone with the identical single clean substitution. EF538941-943 also carry the mutation but with additional ambiguous/background positions (X calls), not used as the primary pair. Numbering: black-grass (AJ310767)-native position 2088 maps to 1UYS (yeast) chain B/C position 2013, confirmed via pairwise alignment cross-validated against all 12 of Delye et al. 2005's own explicitly-stated yeast<->black-grass anchor correspondences (12/12 exact match). Mechanism class not yet resolved from a structural/kinetic paper analogous to Dayan 2010 for PPO - flagged open per this project's standard (do not infer).
